creator: julian@network.dreaming.org
text:
p5-Mysql fails to build because it cannot find errmsg.h. This file used
to be installed with mysql322-server into /usr/local/include/mysql but no
longer gets installed. It is shipped with the mysql322-server source code.

Fix: 

Patch the mysql322-server port (Makefile, or otherwise) to install
	the errmsg.h into /usr/local/include/mysql.
How-To-Repeat: 
	# cd /usr/ports/databases/p5-Mysql && make install
